# nat-accordion



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Premium Accordion Component

## Properties

| Property               | Attribute  | Description                       | Type      | Default     |
| ---------------------- | ---------- | --------------------------------- | --------- | ----------- |
| `disabled`             | `disabled` | Whether the accordion is disabled | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `expanded`             | `expanded` | Whether the accordion is expanded | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `heading` _(required)_ | `heading`  | The heading text of the accordion | `string`  | `undefined` |


## Events

| Event       | Description                        | Type                                  |
| ----------- | ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| `natToggle` | Emitted when the accordion toggles | `CustomEvent<{ expanded: boolean; }>` |


## Slots

| Slot | Description            |
| ---- | ---------------------- |
|      | Main accordion content |
